# browser-profiles (Go)

> Self-hosted anti-detect browser profiles for Go. Open-source AdsPower / Multilogin alternative,
> driven by go-rod. A faithful port of @aitofy/browser-profiles from TypeScript to Go.

## What is this?

A Go library + CLI for managing anti-detect browser profiles, driven by go-rod
(github.com/go-rod/rod) instead of Puppeteer/Playwright. Profiles are stored locally
(~/.aitofy/browser-profiles), fingerprints (WebRTC/Canvas/WebGL/Audio/automation-bypass) are
injected via CDP, and authenticated HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS5 proxies are supported via a local
credential-injecting forward proxy.

## Install

```
go get github.com/postfix/browser-profiles
go install github.com/postfix/browser-profiles/cmd/browser-profiles@latest
```

Requires Go 1.26+ and a local Chrome/Chromium (auto-detected or CHROME_PATH).

## Key features

- Self-hosted profile storage, format-compatible with the reference implementation.
- Byte-faithful anti-detect protection scripts (golden-string verified).
- Authenticated proxy support (HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS5) via a local forward proxy.
- Auto timezone detection from proxy IP (ip-api.com) + CDP override.
- go-rod native: returns *rod.Browser + *rod.Page; protections reach every tab (M5 browser-level injection).
- CLI: list/create/open/launch/info/delete/path.

## Quick examples

### Temporary session (random fingerprint)

```go
import bp "github.com/postfix/browser-profiles"

sess, _ := bp.CreateSession(bp.CreateSessionOptions{
    Proxy: &bp.ProxyConfig{Type: "http", Host: "proxy.com", Port: 8080},
})
defer sess.Terminate()
sess.Page.MustNavigate("https://example.com")
```

### Profile management + launch

```go
profiles := bp.NewBrowserProfiles(bp.BrowserProfilesOptions{})
p, _ := profiles.Create(bp.ProfileConfig{
    Name:  "My Account",
    Proxy: &bp.ProxyConfig{Type: "http", Host: "proxy.com", Port: 8080, Username: "u", Password: "p"},
})
sess, _ := bp.WithProfile(profiles, p.ID, bp.LaunchOptions{})
defer sess.Close()
sess.Page.MustNavigate("https://whoer.net")
```

### Generate a fingerprint

```go
import "github.com/postfix/browser-profiles/fingerprint"
fp := fingerprint.GenerateFingerprint(fingerprint.GenerateFingerprintOptions{Platform: "macos", Gpu: "apple"})
scripts := fingerprint.GetFingerprintScripts(fp)
```

## API summary

- BrowserProfiles: Create, Get, GetByName, GetByIdOrName, List, Update, Delete, groups, Duplicate,
  Export/Import, Launch/LaunchByName/LaunchByIdOrName, Close/CloseAll/GetRunning.
- WithProfile, QuickLaunch, CreateSession -> *Session{Browser, Page, Close, Terminate}.
- LaunchChrome, LaunchChromeStandalone, GetChromePath, PatchPage.
- fingerprint: GenerateFingerprint, GetAllProtectionScripts, GetFingerprintScripts.

## CLI commands

- browser-profiles list [--json]
- browser-profiles create <name> [--id --proxy --timezone --language --platform]
- browser-profiles open <idOrName> [--headless]
- browser-profiles launch [--proxy --headless --random]
- browser-profiles info <idOrName> [--json]
- browser-profiles delete <idOrName>
- browser-profiles path
- browser-profiles --version

## Use cases

1. Multi-account management (isolated profiles).
2. Web scraping with rotating proxies + fingerprints.
3. Testing across browser configurations.
4. Automation across isolated browser sessions.

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/postfix/browser-profiles
- go-rod: https://github.com/go-rod/rod
